Title: Omitted sample report
Abstract
The results suggest a small but potentially meaningful difference.
Methods
Participants were randomly assigned to a control group and an intervention group. Materials are available upon request.
Results
The intervention group outperformed the control group, p = 0.02, 95% CI [0.10, 0.60], Cohen's d = 0.35.
Discussion
The findings may indicate an effect that should be replicated.
References
Lee, C. (2019). Example article.
